title: Aubergine & Curried Sesame Noodle Salad
summary: A silky, spicy, tahini noodle salad with roasted aubergine & a punchy curry dressing. Perfect cold from the fridge for a scrummy make-ahead lunch.

method.description: Trim and dice the aubergines into 2cm chunks. Spread out on a baking tray, drizzle with olive oil and season well. Roast for 20–25 mins until golden and creamy inside.
Meanwhile, cook the rice noodles following pack instructions. Once soft, run them under cold water in a sieve to chill them down, then toss with the chilli oil until coated.
Pick the coriander leaves and set aside. Save the stems for the dressing.

Chuck the tahini, coriander stems, ice cubes, curry powder, maple syrup and juice of the limes into a blender. Blitz until smooth. Taste, season with salt, and add more maple if you want it sweeter. The dressing should be runny, it’ll thicken slightly as it rests.
To box up, pour the dressing into the base of your containers. Pile the chilli noodles on top, followed by the roasted aubergine, and finish with the coriander leaves.
Chill until needed. Shake well before serving.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
